use_cases: Display warning messages to users in SaaS applications
Show success confirmations after form submissions
Present error states for validation failures in forms
Create dismissible alert banners for marketing announcements
ai_summary: A versatile Alert component with multiple variants (default, warning, error, success, info) and sizes. Supports inline icons, action buttons, and two layout modes (row for single-line alerts, complex for multi-line content). Designed as a notification system with optional shadow styling and border accents. Fully accessible with role='alert' attribute.
